text:
To obtain the total amount paid by Medicare for the stay, the pass-through amount (which is the daily 
per diem amount; field called PASSTHRU) must be added to this field. 

SHORT NAME: PMT_AMT 

LONG NAME: MDCR_PMT_AMT 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: MedPAR (derived) 

COMMENT: This field is derived by accumulating the payment amount that is present on all the claim records 
included in the stay (i.e., the sum of payment [reimbursement] reported on the claims that comprise the 
stay). 

In
